items.summary: Removed the board-local parser mirror by routing reviewer and leader parsing through the shared review-engine helpers, while keeping bug-report and auto-fix escalation local to the board.
Deleted the local pre-validation and JSON-cleaning helpers from the board and reused the shared review-engine versions instead.
Aligned board-side path existence checks with the tool-wide `stat`-based behavior instead of reading file contents.
Tightened shared-module-loader so it only swallows ENOENT from the existence check and now lets real import errors surface directly.
